entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An important crop for arid and semi-arid regions of the world.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where pearl millet is primarily grown.

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a parent to pass on favorable traits to its offspring, categorized into GCA and SCA.

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics associated with the productivity of grain and stover.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental state where water is supplied to the crop, used as a control.

entities.name: DROUGHT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental state characterized by water deficiency.

entities.name: HETEROSIS BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at utilizing hybrid vigor to improve crop yield.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME SEGMENT SUBSTITUTION LINES
entities.description: Genetic resources used for precise QTL mapping and identifying naturally occurring favorable alleles.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify the genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: FAVORABLE ALLELES
entities.description: Versions of genes that provide beneficial traits to the plant.

entities.name: TESTCROSS HYBRID POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations created by crossing specific lines to evaluate combining ability.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of vegetative biomass produced per unit area.

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: One of the time periods during which the traits were evaluated.

entities.name: WET SEASON
entities.description: One of the time periods during which the traits were evaluated.

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A condition of limited water availability affecting plant growth.

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average effect of a parent in combination with other parents.

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of a hybrid's performance from the expected value based on GCA.

entities.name: MARKER LOCI
entities.description: Specific locations on a chromosome used as landmarks for mapping traits.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors.

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration from planting to the onset of flowering.

entities.name: PANICLE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of panicles produced per plant.

entities.name: PANICLE YIELD
entities.description: The yield produced by a single panicle.

entities.name: XPSMP716
entities.description: A specific marker locus linked to flowering time, panicle number, and panicle yield.

entities.name: LG4
entities.description: Linkage group 4 where specific marker loci are located.

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER PANICLE
entities.description: The number of grains found on a single panicle.

entities.name: XPSMP2076
entities.description: A specific marker locus linked to flowering time and grain number per panicle.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs focused on developing superior hybrid varieties for population improvement.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A process of selecting plants based on the presence of specific genetic markers.
